from __future__ import annotations


class Cache:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self._items: list[str] = []

    def store(self, item: str) -> None:
        self._items.append(item)


def test_asserts_private_attribute_value_instead_of_behavior_positive() -> None:
    cache = Cache()
    cache.store("x")
    assert cache._items == ["x"]
